security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'ipc:' https://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Kill and manage TCP port processes
bundle.longDescription: Windows developer tool for managing TCP port processes. List what is listening, kill it, or restart it — with enough context to know what you are hitting.
